# VITA-M — We Engineer Moments

## Agency Identity
- Name: VITA-M
- Type: Behaviour-driven brand strategy, creative production, business consulting and startup operations consultancy
- Headquarters: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- Operating Region: India (nationwide), with international capacity
- Website: https://vitam.agency
- Contact: business.vitam@gmail.com

## Leadership
- Aditya Pawar V — Chief Executive Officer. Leads vision, brand engagements, client relationships and agency growth. Deep expertise in graphic design, motion graphics and video production.
- Kirtan Tata — Chief Technology Officer. Drives technology infrastructure, AI-assisted workflow design and enterprise digitisation roadmaps.

## Core Positioning
VITA-M does not just build brands. We engineer global scale efficiency. Our methodology integrates applied behavioural science, cognitive bias analysis, ethnographic consumer observation and choice architecture into every engagement. Strategy begins with real-world consumer behaviour observation, not assumptions or data sheets.

## Service Pillars

### Brand Communication
Positioning strategy and brand voice architecture. Campaign conceptualisation and messaging frameworks. Audience segmentation and consumer insight mapping. SEC-compliant and regulatory-aware content creation. Social media strategy across Instagram, X and LinkedIn.

### Creative Production
Instagram, X and LinkedIn post design and copywriting. Reels, video ads and short-form video production. Product and brand photography, visual identity rollout. Blockchain and Web3 community content and graphics. Launch campaigns, event creatives and print collateral.

### Behaviour Design
Consumer journey mapping from real-world observation. Retail and in-store experience design. Behavioural nudge frameworks for conversion optimisation. Launch moment engineering and activation planning. Data-informed UX and decision-architecture consulting.

### Business Consulting
VITA-M acts as an embedded strategic partner. We work alongside founders and leadership teams to identify growth vectors, resolve operational bottlenecks and build the go-to-market architecture needed to scale. Services include market expansion advisory, channel partner design and investor-ready business narrative development.

### Startup Operations
For early-stage and growth-stage startups, VITA-M provides the operational backbone that founders need but rarely have time to build. CTO-layer technology coordination, vendor selection, product roadmap alignment. Recruitment strategy, JD creation, candidate pipeline management. OKR frameworks, reporting structures, team accountability systems. Sprint oversight and performance review design.

## Methodology — The VITA-M Method
1. OBSERVE: Immersive consumer behaviour research using contextual inquiry and in-situ observation.
2. DECODE: Cognitive bias frameworks (anchoring, loss aversion, endowment effect, status quo bias) to translate observations into strategic levers. Built on Kahneman, Tversky and Thaler.
3. DESIGN: Choice architecture and nudge theory structuring every creative decision with documented behavioural rationale.
4. DEPLOY & MEASURE: Continuous A/B testing with behavioural benchmarks, measuring real consumer action against predicted models.

## Productised Offerings
- Behavioural Brand Diagnostic Sprint (4 weeks, from INR 3.5L)
- Brand Identity System Sprint (6 weeks, from INR 5L)
- Content Ecosystem Build Sprint (8 weeks, from INR 4L)

## Client Work

### Sunrise Lifts — Manufacturing, B2B, Elevator Solutions (AP & Telangana)
Designed a structured B2B business model with channel partner frameworks, pricing tiers and commission structures. Built a market expansion roadmap for Hyderabad, Vijayawada, Tirupati and Guntur with tailored messaging per market. Social content strategy anchored in trust, technical authority and regional affinity.

### Diamond Hooves — Blockchain, Web3 NFT Gaming, B2B Consulting
Dual-track delivery: high-energy X content demystifying the ecosystem lifecycle with character-driven artwork and infographics for the retail community, plus B2B pitch materials and outreach strategy targeting Web3 investors, launchpad platforms and ecosystem partners.

### JOY — AI Supply Chain Optimisation, Enterprise Digitisation
Embedded at the operations layer to redesign supply chain workflows using AI-assisted automation. Built enterprise digitisation roadmap covering CRM integration, data reporting infrastructure and client-facing portal design. Social launch campaigns and enterprise brand identity.

### HAC — Finance, SEC-Compliant Content Strategy
Developed content strategy balancing regulatory compliance with creative effectiveness. Frameworks for compliant social content, investor communications and market-facing materials meeting SEC standards.

### IFA Adventures — Travel & Tourism, Adventure Packages (India & International)
Dual-format content strategy: atmospheric destination posters with bold typography and precise pricing callouts for domestic packages (Ladakh, Chardham, Ratha Yatra), and editorial travel guide carousels for international destinations (Hanoi, Vietnam).

## Differentiators
1. Behaviour-First Strategy: observation over assumption, real psychology over guesswork.
2. End-to-End Ownership: communication, operations, production, consulting — one team, no handoffs.
3. Cross-Industry Fluency: blockchain to elevators to financial compliance — outcomes over labels.
4. AI & Operations Integration: embedded technology, not just marketing.
5. Culturally Calibrated Content: regional language, platform-native, compliance-aware.
6. Startup-Embedded Partnership: operational co-founder layer for early-stage companies.
